action.reasoning: Observation: I've successfully trained a model and evaluated it, achieving a balanced accuracy of 0.1667 on the test set. This is quite low, confirming that domain generalization is challenging for this task. The model performed better on the validation set (0.3938), indicating overfitting to the source domains. Analysis: To improve performance, I need to implement domain generalization techniques. I'll modify the model to include domain adaptation. Specifically, I'll implement a Domain Adversarial Neural Network (DANN) approach that includes a gradient reversal layer to encourage domain-invariant features. Decision: I'll update the model.py to include domain adversarial components, modify train.py to include domain classification loss, and continue training for more epochs.
